name: create_drc_violation
full_help:
create_drc_violation

Description: 
Create a DRC violation

Syntax: 
create_drc_violation  -name <arg> [-severity <arg>] [-msg <arg>] [-quiet]
                      [-verbose] [<objects>...]

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  -name        Specify the name for this rule.  This is the typically a 4-6 
               letter specification for your rule.
  [-severity]  Specify severity level for a DRC rule.
               Default: WARNING.
               Values: FATAL, ERROR, CRITICAL WARNING, WARNING, ADVISORY.
  [-msg]       Specify your message string for this DRC rule.
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]  Cells, ports, pins, nets, clock regions, sites, package banks 
               to query.

Categories: 
DRC, Report

arguments.description: Specify the name for this rule.  This is the typically a 4-6 letter specification for your rule.
